LightningComponentBundle.description: Delta Term Builder app: select an Account, start a negotiation Quote, add route-based Terms, set each Term's route/requirement attributes, and add fare-class products under the selected Term.

property.name: accountId
property.label: Preselected Account Id
property.description: Optional Account Id to preselect on load. Usually left blank; the app also honors a c__accountId URL parameter for deep links from an Account page.

property.name: quoteRecordId
property.label: Preselected Negotiation (Quote) Id
property.description: Optional Quote Id to open directly on load; its Account is loaded automatically. Usually left blank; the app also honors a c__quoteId URL parameter for deep links into a specific negotiation.
